fault_hypothesis: The bug is on line 69. The list comprehension `[int(x) for x in raw]` truncates fractional bandwidth shares, causing the sum of the allocated bandwidth to be less than the total available bandwidth.

constraints.intent: The sum of the final integer allocations must equal the total bandwidth.
The sum of the computed raw (floating-point) shares must equal the total available bandwidth.

spec.expr: all(x >= minimum for x in raw__1)

constraints.intent: Each raw share must be at least the specified minimum before integer conversion.
